_notes: Milestone day ranges use dayMin/dayMax. Event unlock conditions use either unlockDayMin (server age threshold) or unlockAfterEvent (triggered by another in-game event).

milestones.name: Generation 1 Heroes
milestones.desc: Infantry, Cavalry, Archer (Epic) available at launch

milestones.name: Kingdom of Power (KvK)
milestones.desc: Kingdom becomes eligible for Kingdom of Power event

milestones.name: Truegold Level 5 & Truegold Crucible
milestones.desc: Truegold Level 5 and Truegold Crucible building unlock

milestones.name: Artisan's Vision & Vikings Vengeance Lv12-20
milestones.desc: Artisan's Vision in Alliance Championship Store; Vikings Vengeance levels 12–20

milestones.name: Generation 4 Heroes & Pets
milestones.desc: Infantry, Cavalry (Mythic); Giant Rhino, Mighty Bison. Gen 2 Heroes available in Recruitment & Intel Missions.

milestones.name: Generation 5 Heroes & Pets
milestones.desc: Infantry, Archer (Mythic); Great Moose, Alpha Black Panther

milestones.name: Generation 6 Heroes & Pets
milestones.desc: Regal White Lion, Ironclad War Elephant

eventUnlocks.name: Alliance Brawl
eventUnlocks.notes: Unlocks after server's first Kingdom of Power (KvK) event. KvK window is day 70–80.

eventUnlocks.name: Officer Project
eventUnlocks.notes: Unlocks after completing Age of Truegold. Age of Truegold starts at day 70; Officer Project requires finishing it, so effective unlock is somewhat after day 70.

eventUnlocks.name: Armament Competition
eventUnlocks.notes: Same unlock condition as Officer Project — requires completing Age of Truegold. Also appears in some calendars as Stand of Arms.

eventUnlocks.name: Strongest Governor
eventUnlocks.notes: Runs after each KvK. Skip any Strongest Governor on the calendar that starts before the server's first KvK day.

eventUnlocks.name: Merchant Empire
eventUnlocks.notes: Not confirmed available on Gen 2 servers. Filtered from timeline pending confirmation.

eventUnlocks.name: Vikings Vengeance
eventUnlocks.notes: Levels 12–20 unlock at day 170 per server timeline. Lower levels may be available earlier.
